AD_COLUMN.NAME: Updated
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: The date that this record was last updated
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Updated field indicates the date that this record was updated.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Ordered Quantity
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: The number of an item involved in a transaction, given in standard units. It is used to determine price per unit.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Ordered Quantity indicates the quantity of a product that was ordered.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Organization
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_COLUMN.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Updated By
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: User who updated this records
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Updated By field indicates the user who updated this record.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Product
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: An item produced by a process.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: Identifies an item which is either purchased or sold in this organization.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: DocumentNo
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: An often automatically generated identifier for all documents.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The document number is usually automatically generated by the system and determined by the document type of the document. If the document is not saved, the preliminary number is displayed in "<>". If the document type of your document has no automatic document sequence defined, the field will be empty when creating a new document. This is for documents which usually have an external number (like vendor invoice). If you leave the field empty, the system will generate a document number for you. The document sequence used for this fallback number is defined in the "Document Sequence" window with the name "DocumentNo_<TableName>", where TableName is the actual name of the table inside the database (e.g. C_Order).

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Updated By
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: User who updated this records
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Updated By field indicates the user who updated this record.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Updated By
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: User who updated this records
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Updated By field indicates the user who updated this record.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Updated
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: The date that this record was last updated
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Updated field indicates the date that this record was updated.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Updated
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: The date that this record was last updated
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Updated field indicates the date that this record was updated.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Business Partner
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: Anyone who takes part in daily business operations by acting as a customer, employee, etc.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: A Business Partner is anyone with whom you transact. This can include a customer, vendor, employee or any combination of these.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Line Net Amount
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: The final amount of a specified line, based only on quantities and prices.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: Indicates the line net amount based on the quantity and the actual price. Any additional charges or freight are not included.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Product
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: An item produced by a process.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: Identifies an item which is either purchased or sold in this organization.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Unit Price
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: The price that will be paid for a specified item.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The actual price indicates the price for a product in source currency.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Document Type
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A value defining what sequence and process setup are used to handle this document.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Document Type determines document sequence and processing rules

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Tax
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: The percentage of money requested by the government for this specified product or transaction.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Tax indicates the type of tax for this document line.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Price List
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A catalog of selected items with prices defined generally or for a specific partner.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: Price Lists are used to determine the pricing, margin and cost of items purchased or sold.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Organization
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_COLUMN.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Document Status
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: The Document Status indicates the status of a document at this time.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Document Status indicates the status of a document at this time. To change the status of a document, use one of the buttons usually located at the bottom of the document window.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Organization
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_COLUMN.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Process Now
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A request to process the respective document or task.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: When this field is set as 'Y' a process is being performed on this record.
